name_cn:
Original leather
11050A
Nappa leather Flamenco Clutch
The Flamenco Clutch, released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature knotted bow. This version is made of Nappa leather.
Flamenco can hold a large wallet, all phone sizes, or an A5 notebook, a 0.5L bottle, and sunglasses case
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or as a clutch
Detachable adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Gold suede lining
Loewe hot-stamped or hot-pressed 30-19-24
